name: WestBond Enterprises Corporation
summary: WestBond Enterprises Corporation, together with its subsidiary WestBond Industries Inc., manufactures and sells disposable paper products for medical, hygienic, and industrial uses in Canada and the United States. The company offers personal hygiene paper products, such as roll and folded hand towels, jumbo roll and conventional bathroom tissue, center pull towels, kraft roll towels, and single fold towels; and clinical products, including sheets, examination table papers, pillowcases, gowns, dental bibs, sheets, drapes, aprons, chiropractor rolls, and dental head rest covers. It also provides long-term care products, including fold and roll air laid wipes, waterproof underlays, and mitts. The company sells its products primarily to medical and industrial distributors, as well as to end-users on a direct basis. WestBond Enterprises Corporation is headquartered in Delta, Canada.
